Package de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

Interface OperationContract

All Superinterfaces:
Contract, SpecificationElement
All Known Subinterfaces:

All Known Implementing Classes:

public interface OperationContract extends Contract

    IProgramMethod
    getTarget()
    Returns the contracted function symbol.
    boolean
    hasFreeModifiable(LocationVariable heap)
    Returns true iff the method (according to a free clause of the contract) does not modify the heap at all, i.e., iff it is freely "strictly pure."
    boolean
    hasModifiable(LocationVariable heap)
    Returns true iff the method (according to the contract) does not modify the heap at all, i.e., iff it is "strictly pure."
    OperationContract
    map(UnaryOperator<Term> op, Services services)
    Applies a unary operator to every term in this specification element.

  • Method Details

    • getTarget

      IProgramMethod getTarget()
      Description copied from interface: Contract
      Returns the contracted function symbol.
      Specified by:
      getTarget in interface Contract

    • map

      OperationContract map(UnaryOperator<Term> op, Services services)
      Description copied from interface: SpecificationElement
      Applies a unary operator to every term in this specification element.
      Specified by:
      map in interface Contract
      Specified by:
      map in interface SpecificationElement
      Parameters:
      op - the operator to apply.
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this specification element with the operator applied.

    • hasModifiable

      boolean hasModifiable(LocationVariable heap)
      Returns true iff the method (according to the contract) does not modify the heap at all, i.e., iff it is "strictly pure."
      Returns:
      whether this contract is strictly pure.

    • hasFreeModifiable

      boolean hasFreeModifiable(LocationVariable heap)
      Returns true iff the method (according to a free clause of the contract) does not modify the heap at all, i.e., iff it is freely "strictly pure."
      Returns:
      whether this contract is freely strictly pure.

    • getModifiable

      Term getModifiable(LocationVariable heapVar, LocationVariable selfVar, ImmutableList<LocationVariable> paramVars, Services services)
      Returns the modifiable clause of the contract.
      Parameters:
      heapVar - the heap variable.
      selfVar - the self variable.
      paramVars - the list of parameter variables.
      services - the services object.
      Returns:
      the modifiable clause.

    • getModifiable

      Term getModifiable(LocationVariable heapVar, Term heapTerm, Term selfTerm, ImmutableList<Term> paramTerms, Services services)
      Returns the modifiable clause of the contract.
      Parameters:
      heapVar - the heap variable
      heapTerm - the heap variable term.
      selfTerm - the self variable term.
      paramTerms - the list of parameter variable terms.
      services - the services object.
      Returns:
      the modifiable clause.

    • getFreeModifiable

      Term getFreeModifiable(LocationVariable heapVar, LocationVariable selfVar, ImmutableList<LocationVariable> paramVars, Services services)
      Returns the free modifiable clause of the contract.
      Parameters:

      selfVar - the self variable.
      paramVars - the list of parameter variables.
      services - the services object.
      Returns:
      the free modifiable clause.

    • getFreeModifiable

      Term getFreeModifiable(LocationVariable heapVar, Term heapTerm, Term selfTerm, ImmutableList<Term> paramTerms, Services services)
      Returns the free modifiable clause of the contract.
      Parameters:
      heapVar - the heap variable
      heapTerm - the heap variable term.
      selfTerm - the self variable term.
      paramTerms - the list of parameter variable terms.
      services - the services object.
      Returns:
